loading.description: Minimum for first spin — UI controls, reel land, payline, rollup

main.description: Base game — symbols, big win, anticipation, rollups. Loaded on first spin.

bonus.description: All bonus modes (free spins, hold & win, picker) + transitions. Loaded on scatter/trigger.

standalone.description: Music loops — too large for sprites, each exported as individual M4A. Loaded via Web Audio (full decode into RAM).

streaming.description: Background music — built as M4A but NOT in soundManifest. Game loads via HTML5 Audio (streams from disk, ~3 MB RAM instead of ~40 MB). Auto-generates BGMStreaming.ts for game developer.
